metadata.title: Full Arch Rehabilitation and Dental Treatments Clinic in Athens - Dental Opsis Clinic
metadata.metaDescription: Get top-quality dental treatments in Athens! From veneers to full arch rehabilitation, we offer expert care. Book your appointment today!

Discover Advanced Dental Care in Athens

Home About Us Team Our Services Periodontics Prosthodontics Orthodontics endodontics General dentistry Dental implants Blog Dental Tourism Contact Us Location Book Appointment Home About Us Team Our Services Periodontics Prosthodontics Orthodontics endodontics General dentistry Dental implants Blog Dental Tourism Contact Us Location Book Appointment Dental Care For YOUR NEW SMILE Working Hours Mon - Fri 9am - 9pm Book an Appointment Emergency Service Emergency Line +2110033071 / +306970334400 jQuery(document).ready(function($){ "use strict"; function postsCarousel() { var checkWidth = jQuery(window).width(); var owlPost = jQuery(".yolo-sc-call-to-action .sc-call-to-action-inner"); if (checkWidth > 1024) { if(typeof owlPost.data('owl.carousel') != 'undefined'){ owlPost.data('owl.carousel').destroy(); } owlPost.removeClass('owl-carousel'); } else if (checkWidth <= 1024) { owlPost.addClass('owl-carousel'); owlPost.owlCarousel({ margin: 0, items : 3, autoHeight:true, slideSpeed : 5000, autoplay: false, autoplaySpeed: 1000, rtl: false, autoplayTimeout: 5000, dots: true, loop: false, responsive : { 0 : { items : 1 }, // breakpoint from 480 up 600 : { items : 1, }, 800 : { items : 2, }, } }); } } postsCarousel(); jQuery(window).resize(postsCarousel); }); We Care For Your Dental Health We are privately-owned company with client’s interests near our heart. We work to create the right environment for our staff to thrive, feel valued, enjoy their work, and provide an unparalleled patient experience. Our doctors proceed in numerous expert programs and Masters to offer the highest dental care for our patients. We instruct and teach the exceptionally imperative estimation of oral wellbeing and what every single patient can do to keep his or her teeth solid during their lifetime. We are committed to offering our patients great dentistry in a minding and delicate way. Read More Why Choose US Flexible Care Delivery Models Periodontics We offer a total scope of dental and cleanliness medications, performed by talented and … Read More Endodontics We offer a total scope of dental and cleanliness medications, performed by talented and … Read More Prosthodontics We offer a total scope of dental and cleanliness medications, performed by talented and … Read More Orthodontics We offer a total scope of dental and cleanliness medications, performed by talented and … Read More General Dentistry We offer a total scope of dental and cleanliness medications, performed by talented and … Read More jQuery(document).ready(function($){ "use strict"; function postsCarousel() { var checkWidth = jQuery(window).width(); var owlPost = jQuery(".yolo-sc-services .services-wrap-inner"); owlPost.addClass('owl-carousel'); owlPost.owlCarousel({ margin: 0, items : 5, autoHeight:false, autoplay: true, loop: true, rtl: false, autoplayTimeout: 3000, dots: false, responsive : { 0 : { items : 1 }, 768 : { items : 1, }, 1025 : { items : 5, }, } }); } postsCarousel(); jQuery(window).resize(postsCarousel); }); Perfect Smile, Excellence Defined We will work with you to develop individualised care plans, including management of chronic diseases. We treat all enquiries sensitively and in the strictest confidence. We’re here to care for you and your entire family. Regular visits to the doctor will depend on your age and general health! View More jQuery(document).ready(function($){ "use strict"; $('.before-after-inner-692dcb3dd3be3').yoloImageComparison({ control_offset: 50, direction: 'horizontal', transition: 'overlay', before_label: '', after_label: '', comparison_type: 'mouse_move', }); $(".before-after-slideshow-692dcb3dd3bdf").slick({ infinite: false, adaptiveHeight: false, autoplay: false, autoplaySpeed: 3000, arrows: true, dots: true, slidesToScroll: 1, draggable: false, swipe: false, slidesToShow: 1, responsive: [ { breakpoint: 1024, settings: { slidesToShow: 1 } }, { breakpoint: 768, settings: { slidesToShow: 1 } } ] }).on('breakpoint', function(event, slick, breakpoint) { $('.before-after-slideshow-692dcb3dd3bdf .before-after-inner').each(function() { let cur = $(this); let data = cur.data(); cur.yoloImageComparison({ control_offset: data.offset, direction: data.direction, transition: data.transition, before_label: data.before_label, after_label: data.after_label, comparison_type: data.type, }); }); }).on('setPosition', function(slick) { $('.before-after-slideshow-692dcb3dd3bdf .before-after-inner').each(function() { let cur = $(this); let data = cur.data(); cur.yoloImageComparison({ control_offset: data.offset, direction: data.direction, transition: data.transition, before_label: data.before_label, after_label: data.after_label, comparison_type: data.type, }); }); }); }); Discover Advanced Dental Care in Athens When it comes to complete dental restoration, no one does it better than Dental Opsis Clinic’s pioneers in Full Arch Rehabilitation. Exquisite smile makeovers are our speciality at our Athens state-of-the-art facility. Smiles Transformed by Ceramic Veneers Our superior Ceramic Veneers Athens will improve your smile. Both citizens and tourists of Athens may take advantage of customized dental treatments intended to enhance both appearance and functionality. Our proficient staff uses state-of-the-art technology to produce outcomes that are both visually authentic and durable. Consider Visiting Greece for Dental Care Looking for Dental Vacations? With its stunning Athens and world-class Dental Tourism Greece is the perfect vacation spot for you. From the first consultation all the way to full recovery, our foreign clientele have a smooth experience at Dental Opsis Clinic. What Sets Us Apart? We are different because we are committed to both meeting and above patient expectations. We promise to provide you with a group of highly qualified professionals and a kind, welcoming atmosphere so that your dental experience will be enjoyable, effective, and satisfying. For a consultation and the first step toward a beautiful smile, visit Dental Opsis Clinic. What Our Patients Say “The professionalism and friendliness of the whole team is outstanding. I’ve been going with them for a complicated process and then for keeping up and cleaning. Every visit is like visiting friends. I couldn’t be happier with the results.” Maria K. Periodontal Patient “The staff was very friendly and helpful and the dentist was honest and straight forward. I have been to other dentists that exaggerated what my needs were in order to make more money. So it was a relief to find a dentist with integrity.” Anna F. Patient with Prosthodontic rehabilitation It is a magnificent clinic with cheerful workers and excellent service. They speak English very well and attend to your needs and accomodations willingly and without problems. I highly recommend them even for a simple cleaning. 10/10 experience! Colette Kramm Τα λόγια είναι περιττά. Πραγματικά όλα άψογα. Danae Living in Athens as an expat, and being very nervous about dentists in general, I am very happy to have found this clinic, and the wonderful people running it. Easy communication in English, and a very friendly and attentive atmosphere, I can only recommend Dental Opsis Clinic Ina Zarrella Εξαιρετικό ιατρείο, άψογη οργάνωση και ευγένεια. Η γιατρός εμπνέει εμπιστοσύνη και δείχνει πραγματικό ενδιαφέρον για τον ασθενή. Το συνιστώ ανεπιφύλακτα! Dinos kostas jQuery(document).ready(function($){ "use strict"; function postsCarousel() { var checkWidth = jQuery(window).width(); var owlPost = jQuery(".yolo-sc-testimonials .testimonial-item-inner.692dcb3dd570e"); metadata.metaDescription: About our clinic. Get to know the team of Dental Opsis Clinic. From the doctors to our secretary. Let us take care of your smile.

headings.text: Every time you smile at someone, it is an action of love, a gift to that person, a beautiful thing
Because your smile is our passion

about.textContent:
Kanari 24, Athina 106 75, Greece info@dentalopsisclinic.gr Facebook Instagram Pinterest Youtube Home About Us Team Our Services Periodontics Prosthodontics Orthodontics endodontics General dentistry Dental implants Blog Dental Tourism Contact Us Location Book Appointment Home About Us Team Our Services Periodontics Prosthodontics Orthodontics endodontics General dentistry Dental implants Blog Dental Tourism Contact Us Location Book Appointment About Us Every time you smile at someone, it is an action of love, a gift to that person, a beautiful thing About Us Make your smile great again We established Dental Opsis Clinic in 2022. Everyone at Dental Opsis Clinic is on a mission to provide compassionate, world-class care to each person, in every connection. We are committed to clinical practice, providing whole-person care to everyone who needs dental treatment. We focus on a teamwork, excellence, mutual respect, and dedication to putting patients first. We are undaunted by the unknown and walk alongside patients on their journeys to find answers and solutions. Visit us in Athens , Kolonaki and get to know us in person. get to know us Come and meet the team at Dental Opsis Clinic Athens MEet the team Our Mission Because your smile is our passion Our mission is to be innovative and motivated in the pursuit of excellence and embrace the challenges of change in the dental industry, for the benefit of clients. Book An Appoinment What Our Patients Say “The professionalism and friendliness of the whole team is outstanding. I’ve been going with them for a complicated process and then for keeping up and cleaning. Every visit is like visiting friends. I couldn’t be happier with the results.” Maria K. Periodontal Patient “The staff was very friendly and helpful and the dentist was honest and straight forward. I have been to other dentists that exaggerated what my needs were in order to make more money. So it was a relief to find a dentist with integrity.” Anna F. services.textContent:
Kanari 24, Athina 106 75, Greece info@dentalopsisclinic.gr Facebook Instagram Pinterest Youtube Home About Us Team Our Services Periodontics Prosthodontics Orthodontics endodontics General dentistry Dental implants Blog Dental Tourism Contact Us Location Book Appointment Home About Us Team Our Services Periodontics Prosthodontics Orthodontics endodontics General dentistry Dental implants Blog Dental Tourism Contact Us Location Book Appointment Service Menu Our Services Periodontics Prosthodontics Orthodontics Endodontics General Dentistry Dental-implants Book an appointment Comprehensive Dental Services A diverse range of specialized dental clinic services is provided at Dental Opsis Clinic in order to cater to the specific requirements of every patient. Our group of specialists is outfitted with the most recent innovations and procedures to guarantee you get the best quality of care.PeriodonticsOur periodontal administrations center around the counteraction, analysis, and treatment of periodontal disease. We utilize advanced procedures to treat gum disease at any stage and help you maintain healthy gums.ProsthodonticsFrom dentures to bridges and crowns, our prosthodontic treatments are designed to restore your smile. Our prosthodontists work with precision to create solutions that improve functionality and aesthetics.OrthodonticsWhether you’re an adult or a child, our orthodontic services are tailored to align your teeth and improve your bite. We offer a variety of braces and clear aligners to suit your preferences and lifestyle.EndodonticsOur endodontic services include root canal treatment designed to save natural teeth that might otherwise need to be extracted. We focus on eliminating pain and restoring tooth health with minimally invasive techniques.General DentistryFor all-around dental might be concerned, our overall dentistry administrations cover everything from routine cleanings to fillings and tooth extractions. We guarantee top-notch care for patients.At Dental Opsis Clinic, we are committed to enhancing your dental health and well-being. Visit us to experience dental care that’s gentle, effective, and tailored to you.For more details, visit our website: Dental Opsis Clinic Services. The Best Techniques Immediate & Efficient Results We offer a total scope of dental treatment by talented and energetic experts in our clinic. The protocol we use in all dental treatments are the most innovative and trusted procedures. Our motivation is to separate ourselves as a medical procedure that gives far-reaching dentistry of the extremely most astounding quality that upgrades our patients’ lives. Read More General Questions Do the Implanted Teeth Look Natural? Implants have the structure of natural teeth.Also, porcelain has a sheen that is identical to healthy tooth enamel. Aside from being customizable to match the color and luster of healthy teeth, the porcelain crown is shaped accurately to match the form of the lost tooth How to keep my teeth healthy? Take care of your teeth and gumsBrush your teeth twice a day. …Floss between your teeth. …Cut down on sugar, and other lifestyle tips. …Brush baby teeth as soon as they come through. …Get children into a teeth-cleaning routine. …Straighten crooked teeth with braces. …Have regular dental check-ups. What Is the Duration of an Implanted Tooth? Dental implants typically last for 10-15 years or even longer. While the dental implant fuses permanently with the jawbone, the tooth replacement ( the crown) is above the jawline and experiences wear and tear daily. How Should Dental Care Be After the Operation? Care of the mouth – Do not rinse your mouth the day of surgery. This may dislodge the blood clot and interrupt the normal course of healing. The morning after surgery, rinse gently with very warm salt water (1/2 teaspoon of salt in a glass of warm water). Repeat every few hours, especially after meals for 3-4 days. Working Hours We are here to assist you. In case of emergency you can call us anytime at (+30) 6946162005 Mon - Fri 10am - 9pm Saturday Closed Sunday Closed jQuery(document).ready(function($){ "use strict"; $('.before-after-inner-692dbee45dcaf').yoloImageComparison({ control_offset: 50, direction: 'horizontal', transition: 'overlay', before_label: '', after_label: '', comparison_type: 'mouse_move', }); $(".before-after-slideshow-692dbee45dca9").slick({ infinite: false, adaptiveHeight: false, autoplay: false, autoplaySpeed: 3000, arrows: true, dots: true, slidesToScroll: 1, draggable: false, swipe: false, slidesToShow: 1, responsive: [ { breakpoint: 1024, settings: { slidesToShow: 1 } }, { breakpoint: 768, settings: { slidesToShow: 1 } } ] }).on('breakpoint', function(event, slick, breakpoint) { $('.before-after-slideshow-692dbee45dca9 .before-after-inner').each(function() { let cur = $(this); let data = cur.data(); cur.yoloImageComparison({ control_offset: data.offset, direction: data.direction, transition: data.transition, before_label: data.before_label, after_label: data.after_label, comparison_type: data.type, }); }); }).on('setPosition', function(slick) { $('.before-after-slideshow-692dbee45dca9 .before-after-inner').each(function() { let cur = $(this); let data = cur.data(); cur.yoloImageComparison({ control_offset: data.offset, direction: data.direction, transition: data.transition, before_label: data.before_label, after_label: data.after_label, comparison_type: data.type, }); }); }); }); Make an appointment & meet our team. +30 211 0033 071 For emergency please call us on: +30 6970334400 Quick Links Home Services Team Book Appointment Contact Us Working Hours Mon – Fri: 9am – 9pm Saturday: Closed Sunday: Closed Contact Us Phone: +30 211 0033 071 info@dentalopsisclinic.gr Kanari 24, Athina 106 75, Greece Facebook-f Instagram Pinterest Youtube © Copyright DENTAL OPSIS CLINIC All rights reserved.
